title: veronica subsessilis
intro: Veronica subsessilis, also known as the small-leaved speedwell, is a species of flowering plant in the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). The plant is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against cell damage. The medicinal properties of Veronica subsessilis have been associated with various health benefits, including the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and the promotion of wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
